data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the northeast monsoon, it will be cool in the morning over southern China this week. The band of clouds covering Guangdong will thin out gradually today and tomorrow. The weather will improve and it will be dry over the region. A strong replenishment of the monsoon is expected to reach the coast of southern China in the latter part of this week. It will be windy over the region. With the monsoon moderating slightly, temperatures will rise gradually over southern China early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260310","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"Northeast force 4, force 5 at first, occasionally force 6 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
